SlimeWire memecoin TG bot

Memecoin groups move fast and use shorthand. A memecoin TG bot needs to understand CAs, tickers, buy activity, raids, launches, and the need for a deeper chart and wallet-aware review.

Open SlimeWireOpen @SlimeWiredBot

What this search usually means

Fresh market context

Memecoin rooms need quick scans, alerts, and chart links when a token starts moving.

Buy tracking

Visible buy activity can help communities understand current attention around a token.

Raid and launch flow

Launch teams need Telegram cards, proof, and links that route users into the terminal.

Moderation

Fast rooms need anti-spam, anti-link, anti-scam, and admin tools too.

Proof and PnL

Receipts, call context, and PnL pages help communities review outcomes.

SlimeWire fit

SlimeWire combines Telegram and web workflows for Solana memecoin traders.

Related SlimeWire pages

Solana Memecoin Bot · TG Trading Bot · Pump Fun Terminal · Solana Memecoin Trading Platform · Resources · Solana Telegram Bot

FAQ

What is a memecoin TG bot?

It is a Telegram bot used by memecoin groups for scans, alerts, buy tracking, raids, and community workflows.

Is SlimeWire focused on memecoins?

Yes. SlimeWire is built around Solana memecoin terminal and Telegram bot workflows.

Can it help with launches?

Yes. SlimeWire documents launch alerts, raid cards, proof, token scans, and terminal handoff.

Does it guarantee wins?

No. Memecoin trading is risky, and software cannot guarantee results.
